description: A minimal Android activity (DiagnosticActivity) written in Kotlin, used for displaying startup diagnostics, crash markers, and in-memory initialization failure information. It provides a UI with buttons to clear crash markers and proceed to the main app, primarily for debugging and troubleshooting.

classes.name: DiagnosticActivity
classes.description: An Android AppCompatActivity subclass that displays startup diagnostics, crash markers, and init failure messages, with options to clear crash markers and continue to the main application.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Initializes the activity, attempting to display crash marker and init failure info, with fallback to a minimal message if rendering fails.

methods.name: spaceDp
methods.description: Creates a space view with specified height in dp to separate UI elements.
